design_intent: 优先强化舒适度、恢复感、愉悦感、可停留意愿，营造可感知的正向体验。需要高围合感的自然庇护空间，视觉焦点引导至远处绿色层次。降低硬质界面压迫，增加遮阴与柔和材质过渡。强化停留锚点与边缘可坐性，鼓励短时休憩。提升色彩层次与微景观趣味，避免视觉单调。

layout_actions.动作: 增加垂直绿化与灌木层
layout_actions.植物: 爬藤月季+常春藤 / 耐阴灌木

layout_actions.动作: 弱化人造物视觉占比，覆绿或软化铺装
layout_actions.材质: 透水铺装 / 木质坐凳

layout_actions.动作: 增加可坐边界与停留锚点
layout_actions.植物: 树荫下休息点周边绿化
layout_actions.材质: 木质坐凳 / 树池座椅

morph_adjustment.rationale: 依据体验目标（侧重舒适度、恢复感、愉悦感、可停留意愿）与环境心理学映射规则，建议形态目标：绿视率→0.41, 天空可视率→0.13, 人造物占比→0.50。

confirmed_layout_actions.动作: 增加垂直绿化与灌木层
confirmed_layout_actions.植物: 爬藤月季+常春藤 / 耐阴灌木

confirmed_layout_actions.动作: 弱化人造物视觉占比，覆绿或软化铺装
confirmed_layout_actions.材质: 透水铺装 / 木质坐凳

confirmed_layout_actions.动作: 增加可坐边界与停留锚点
confirmed_layout_actions.植物: 树荫下休息点周边绿化
confirmed_layout_actions.材质: 木质坐凳 / 树池座椅

prompt_draft: Edit this equirectangular 360-degree urban micro-space panorama while preserving overall geometry and camera viewpoint. In the 前景与两侧界面 area, 增加垂直绿化与灌木层, using 爬藤月季+常春藤 / 耐阴灌木, mounted or finished with 木质格栅. In the 硬质墙面与地面 area, 弱化人造物视觉占比，覆绿或软化铺装, using 墙面攀援植物, mounted or finished with 透水铺装 / 木质坐凳. In the 停留节点 area, 增加可坐边界与停留锚点, using 树荫下休息点周边绿化, mounted or finished with 木质坐凳 / 树池座椅. Increase green view ratio from about 22% toward 41% with layered foreground shrubs and mid-ground trees, avoiding unsafe blind spots. Keep sky openness near 13%, with soft dappled shadows and a calm restorative atmosphere. Maintain photorealistic lighting consistency, clean edges, and physically plausible materials. Do not invent new buildings or change road topology drastically.
final_prompt: Edit this equirectangular 360-degree urban micro-space panorama while preserving overall geometry and camera viewpoint. In the 前景与两侧界面 area, 增加垂直绿化与灌木层, using 爬藤月季+常春藤 / 耐阴灌木, mounted or finished with 木质格栅. In the 硬质墙面与地面 area, 弱化人造物视觉占比，覆绿或软化铺装, using 墙面攀援植物, mounted or finished with 透水铺装 / 木质坐凳. In the 停留节点 area, 增加可坐边界与停留锚点, using 树荫下休息点周边绿化, mounted or finished with 木质坐凳 / 树池座椅. Increase green view ratio from about 22% toward 41% with layered foreground shrubs and mid-ground trees, avoiding unsafe blind spots. Keep sky openness near 13%, with soft dappled shadows and a calm restorative atmosphere. Maintain photorealistic lighting consistency, clean edges, and physically plausible materials. Do not invent new buildings or change road topology drastically.
